productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Brown Wallets
description: Crafted from soft leather, this brown wallet from United Colours Of Benetton is fabulously stylish and well organised. This two fold wallet has lots of inner storage making it perfect for everyday useDimensions: 12 cm X 9 cmHas two main compartmentsThree credit card slots on the right sideTwo compartments on the left for coinsTwo transparent compartments for business cards and id cardsRemovable overlapping flap with two credit card slots on the left sidePatch design on the bottom Button with brand logo of Big Ben on the topCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
